description:
# Test/Dev – Do Not Use This Flow ⚠️ **This is a test/development flow and should not be used. It requires capabilities that are not yet available.** ## Top 15 Community-Vetted Use Cases Injects the Top 15 Community-Vetted Use Cases ([See PDF](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1NAagQkEACFOs0twGLFfI9aRKWwh_V4Jp/view)) directly into your layout. These combinations condense punctuation, macros, and layer toggles into highly optimized keys without disrupting your typing rhythm. **Includes nested combinations:** * **4 Hold-Taps** (e.g., God-Tier Thumb, Safe HRM Escape) * **9 Mod-Morphs** (e.g., Smart Escape Corner, Nested Brackets Base) * **12 Tap-Dances** (e.g., Peek-or-Lock Layer Space, Punctuation Powerhouse) * **4 Macros** (e.g., End-of-Line, Arrow Operator) --- ### 1. Thumb Keys (Requires 1 Parameter for the "Hold" action) *Thumb keys are prime real estate. These combinations squeeze maximum utility out of just 2 to 3 thumb keys per hand.* | Behavior Code & Parameter | Action | Why it's useful | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | **`&ht_thumb_bspc`**
*(Set param to a Layer Number, e.g., `1`)* | **Hold:** Nav Layer
**Tap:** Backspace
**Shift+Tap:** Delete | **The "God-Tier" Thumb Backspace:** Instead of wasting a thumb key on a basic layer toggle, it combines it with text deletion that natively respects the Shift modifier. | | **`&ht_spc_peek_lock`**
*(Set param to a Layer Number, e.g., `2`)* | **Hold:** Num Layer
**Tap:** Space
**Double-Tap:** Locks Num Layer | **The Peek-or-Lock Layer Space:** A standard pattern for Numpad layers. Hold to briefly type numbers, or double-tap to lock the layer for Excel data entry. | | **`&ht_shift_enter`**
*(Set param to `RSHFT`)* | **Hold:** Right Shift
**Tap:** Enter
**Double-Tap:** End of Line + `;` + Enter | **Enter / Shift / End-of-Line Macro:** A coder's favorite for the right thumb. Handles formatting, capitalizing, and statement completion in one cluster. | | **`&ht_space_cadet`**
*(Set param to `LSHFT`)* | **Hold:** Left Shift
**Tap:** `(`
**Double-Tap:** `)` | **Space Cadet Shift Evolved:** A modernized take on Space Cadet Shift. Outputs paired parentheses without leaving the home row, while acting as a normal shift key when held. | --- ### 2. Punctuation & Alphas (0 Parameters required) *By nesting behaviors, these condense symbols that are normally scattered across the far reaches of a keyboard into the center.* | Behavior Code & Parameter | Action | Why it's useful | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | **`&td_punct_power`**
*(Replace your `.` key)* | **Tap:** `.`
**Shift+Tap:** `:`
**Double-Tap:** `...` | **The Punctuation Powerhouse:** Reclaims default comma/period keys by overwriting `<` and `>` with more common prose punctuation. | | **`&td_nested_brackets`**
*(Replace your `[` key)* | **Tap:** `(`
**Shift+Tap:** `<`
**Double-Tap:** `[`
**Shift+Double:** `{` | **The Coder's Nested Brackets:** Puts all three major bracket types on a single key. Shift handles angle brackets, tapping handles the rest. | | **`&td_quest_excl`**
*(Replace your `/` key)* | **Tap:** `/`
**Shift+Tap:** `?`
**Double-Tap:** `!` | **Smart Question & Exclamation:** Groups interrogative and exclamatory punctuation into a single intuitive cluster. | | **`&td_dash_arrow`**
*(Replace your `-` key)* | **Tap:** `-`
**Shift+Tap:** `_`
**Double-Tap:** `->` | **The Dash & Arrow Macro Key:** Essential for C++, PHP, or Markdown where arrows are used frequently. | | **`&td_math_logic`**
*(Replace your `=` key)* | **Tap:** `=`
**Shift+Tap:** `+`
**Double-Tap:** `=>` | **The Math & Logic Operator:** Combines standard mathematical equality with coding logical operators. | --- ### 3. Modifiers & System (Requires 1 Parameter for the "Hold" action) *Safe, zero-latency combinations for the outer columns to handle system utility and window management.* | Behavior Code & Parameter | Action | Why it's useful | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | **`&ht_ctrl_esc`**
*(Set param to `LCTRL`)* | **Hold:** Ctrl
**Tap:** ESC
**Shift+Tap:** `~` | **The 40% Smart Escape Corner:** Solves the classic 60%/40% dilemma where Esc and Tilde share the top-left physical key. | | **`&ht_alt_tab`**
*(Set param to `LALT` or `LGUI`)* | **Hold:** Alt
**Tap:** Tab
**Shift+Tap:** Shift+Tab | **The App Switcher Engine:** Condenses the entire Alt-Tab multi-tasking workflow into a single left-hand column key. | | **`&ht_shift_caps`**
*(Set param to `LSHFT`)* | **Hold:** Shift
**Tap:** Shift
**Double-Tap:** Caps Word | **Smart Caps Word Trigger:** Nests ZMK's `caps_word` into existing Shift keys so you don't need a dedicated Caps Lock key. | | **`&ht_vol_media`**
*(Set param to `C_VOL_UP`)* | **Hold:** Vol Up
**Tap:** Play/Pause
**Double:** Next
**Triple:** Prev | **The Media Maestro:** One key on a secondary layer controls the entire music playback experience via tap repetition. | *If "Implement on layer0" is YES, it will automatically seek out standard keys (`BSPC`, `SPACE`, `/`, `[`, etc.) on your base layer and seamlessly upgrade them to these new behaviors!*
script:
# ZMK Autonomous Injection Script - "Top 15 Advanced Behaviors" (V9 - Strict Tap-Dance Outer Logic)

# --- PRE-REQUISITE: RESOLVE TARGET LAYERS ---
(if $auto_bind == "yes" then
  (
    ["Nav", "Num"] as $req_layers |
    .layer_names |= (. // ["Base"]) |
    .layers |= (. // [[]]) |
    (.layers[0] | length) as $layer_size |
    reduce $req_layers[] as $name (.;
      if (.layer_names | index($name) == null) then
        .layer_names += [$name] |
        .layers += [[range(0; $layer_size) | {"value": "&trans"}]]
      else . end
    )
  )
else . end) |

(.layer_names | index("Nav") // 1) as $idx_nav |
(.layer_names | index("Num") // 2) as $idx_num |


# ==============================================================================
# STEP 1: CREATE NESTED BEHAVIORS
# ==============================================================================

# --- A. MACROS (Strict Root Params) ---
([
  { "name": "&mac_eol_semi", "params": [], "description": "4. End of Line Macro", "waitMs": 0, "tapMs": 0, "bindings": [ { "value": "&macro_tap", "params": [] }, { "value": "&kp", "params": [{"value": "END", "params": []}] }, { "value": "&kp", "params": [{"value": "SEMI", "params": []}] }, { "value": "&kp", "params": [{"value": "RET", "params": []}] } ] },
  { "name": "&mac_ellipsis", "params": [], "description": "9. Ellipsis Macro", "waitMs": 0, "tapMs": 0, "bindings": [ { "value": "&macro_tap", "params": [] }, { "value": "&kp", "params": [{"value": "DOT", "params": []}] }, { "value": "&kp", "params": [{"value": "DOT", "params": []}] }, { "value": "&kp", "params": [{"value": "DOT", "params": []}] } ] },
  { "name": "&mac_arrow", "params": [], "description": "12. Arrow Macro", "waitMs": 0, "tapMs": 0, "bindings": [ { "value": "&macro_tap", "params": [] }, { "value": "&kp", "params": [{"value": "MINUS", "params": []}] }, { "value": "&kp", "params": [{"value": "GT", "params": []}] } ] },
  { "name": "&mac_fat_arrow", "params": [], "description": "14. Fat Arrow Macro", "waitMs": 0, "tapMs": 0, "bindings": [ { "value": "&macro_tap", "params": [] }, { "value": "&kp", "params": [{"value": "EQUAL", "params": []}] }, { "value": "&kp", "params": [{"value": "GT", "params": []}] } ] }
]) as $new_macros |

# --- B. MOD-MORPHS (Inner behaviors that transform Tap 1 based on Shift) ---
([
  { "name": "&mm_bspc_del", "description": "1. Mod-Morph: BSPC / DEL", "cases": [ { "binding": { "value": "&kp", "params": [{"value": "BSPC", "params": []}] }, "mods": [], "keepMods": [] }, { "binding": { "value": "&kp", "params": [{"value": "DEL", "params": []}] }, "mods": ["MOD_LSFT", "MOD_RSFT"], "keepMods": [] } ] },
  { "name": "&mm_esc_tilde", "description": "6. # --- C. TAP-DANCES (Outer behaviors that protect timing windows) ---
([
  { "name": "&td_spc_tog", "description": "2. Peek-or-Lock Layer Space", "tappingTermMs": 200, "bindings": [ { "value": "&lt", "params": [{"value": $idx_num}, {"value": "SPACE", "params": []}] }, { "value": "&tog", "params": [{"value": $idx_num}] } ] },
  { "name": "&td_parens", "description": "3. Space Cadet Evolved", "tappingTermMs": 200, "bindings": [ { "value": "&mt", "params": [{"value": "LSHFT", "params": []}, {"value": "LPAR", "params": []}] }, { "value": "&kp", "params": [{"value": "RPAR", "params": []}] } ] },
  { "name": "&td_enter_eol", "description": "4. Enter / Shift / EOL", "tappingTermMs": 200, "bindings": [ { "value": "&mt", "params": [{"value": "RSHFT", "params": []}, {"value": "RET", "params": []}] }, { "value": "&mac_eol_semi", "params": [] } ] },
  { "name": "&td_caps_word", "description": "7. Caps Word Trigger", "tappingTermMs": 200, "bindings": [ { "value": "&mt", "params": [{"value": "LSHFT", "params": []}, {"value": "LSHFT", "params": []}] }, { "value": "&caps_word", "params": [] } ] },
  { "name": "&td_punct_power", "description": "9. Punctuation Powerhouse", "tappingTermMs": 200, "bindings": [ { "value": "&mm_dot_colon", "params": [] }, { "value": "&mac_ellipsis", "params": [] } ] },
  { "name": "&td_nested_brackets", "description": "10. Coder's Nested Brackets", "tappingTermMs": 200, "bindings": [ { "value": "&mm_paren_angle", "params": [] }, { "value": "&mm_brack_brace", "params": [] } ] },
  { "name": "&td_quest_excl", "description": "11. Smart Question & Exclamation", "tappingTermMs": 200, "bindings": [ { "value": "&mm_slash_qmark", "params": [] }, { "value": "&kp", "params": [{"value": "EXCL", "params": []}] } ] },
  { "name": "&td_dash_arrow", "description": "12. Dash & Arrow Macro Key", "tappingTermMs": 200, "bindings": [ { "value": "&mm_dash_under", "params": [] }, { "value": "&mac_arrow", "params": [] } ] },
  { "name": "&td_media", "description": "13. Media Maestro", "tappingTermMs": 200, "bindings": [ { "value": "&mt", "params": [{"value": "C_VOL_UP", "params": []}, {"value": "C_PP", "params": []}] }, { "value": "&kp", "params": [{"value": "C_NEXT", "params": []}] }, { "value": "&kp", "params": [{"value": "C_PREV", "params": []}] } ] },
  { "name": "&td_math_logic", "description": "14. Math & Logic Operator", "tappingTermMs": 200, "bindings": [ { "value": "&mm_eq_plus", "params": [] }, { "value": "&mac_fat_arrow", "params": [] } ] },
  { "name": "&td_power_screen", "description": "15. OS Power & Screenshot Key", "tappingTermMs": 200, "bindings": [ { "value": "&mm_pscrn_snip", "params": [] }, { "value": "&kp", "params": [{"value": "C_SLEEP", "params": []}] } ] }
]) as $new_dances |

# --- D. HOLD-TAPS (Pure Hold-Taps, Quick-Tap enabled) ---
([
  { "name": "&ht_thumb_bspc", "description": "1. God-Tier Thumb Backspace", "bindings": [ "&mo", "&mm_bspc_del" ], "tappingTermMs": 200, "flavor": "tap-preferred" },
  { "name": "&ht_hrm_safe", "description": "5. Safe HRM Escape (Generic)", "bindings": [ "&kp", "&kp" ], "tappingTermMs": 200, "requirePriorIdleMs": 150, "quickTapMs": 200, "flavor": "tap-preferred" },
  { "name": "&ht_ctrl_esc", "description": "6. 40% Smart Escape Corner", "bindings": [ "&kp", "&mm_esc_tilde" ], "tappingTermMs": 200, "flavor": "tap-preferred" },
  { "name": "&ht_alt_tab", "description": "8. App Switcher Engine", "bindings": [ "&kp", "&mm_tab_bck" ], "tappingTermMs": 200, "flavor": "tap-preferred" }
]) as $new_holds |

(.keymap // .) |= (
  .macros    = ($new_macros + (.macros // []) | unique_by(.name)) |
  .modMorphs = ($new_morphs + (.modMorphs // []) | unique_by(.name)) |
  .tapDances = ($new_dances + (.tapDances // []) | unique_by(.name)) |
  .holdTaps  = ($new_holds  + (.holdTaps  // []) | unique_by(.name)) |
  
  # ==============================================================================
  # STEP 2: AUTO-ASSIGN ON BASE LAYER (Strict Tap-Dance routing)
  # ==============================================================================
  (if $auto_bind == "yes" and (.layers | length > 0) then
    {
      "BSPC":     {"value": "&ht_thumb_bspc", "params": [{"value": $idx_nav}]},
      "SPACE":    {"value": "&td_spc_tog"},
      "RET":      {"value": "&td_enter_eol"},
      "DOT":      {"value": "&td_punct_power"},
      "LBKT":     {"value": "&td_nested_brackets"},
      "FSLH":     {"value": "&td_quest_excl"},
      "MINUS":    {"value": "&td_dash_arrow"},
      "EQUAL":    {"value": "&td_math_logic"},
      "ESC":      {"value": "&ht_ctrl_esc", "params": [{"value": "LCTRL", "params": []}]},
      "TAB":      {"value": "&ht_alt_tab", "params": [{"value": "LALT", "params": []}]},
      "C_VOL_UP": {"value": "&td_media"},
      "PSCRN":    {"value": "&td_power_screen"},
      "LSHFT":    {"value": "&td_caps_word"}
    } as $map |
    
    .layers[0] |= map(
      if type == "object" and .value == "&kp" and .params and (.params | length > 0) and (.params[0].value | in($map)) then
        $map[.params[0].value] + (if .decoration then {decoration: .decoration} else {} end)
      else
        .
      end
    )
  else . end)
)
